spec.title: Number of Index Entries 0.9 Quantile
spec.description: Number of index entries of one resource by resource type.

spec.title: Number of Index Entries 0.99 Quantile
spec.description: Number of index entries of one resource by resource type.

spec.title: Block Cache Data Additions
spec.description: Added blocks per second.

spec.title: Table Reader Memory Usage
spec.description: Values are per Column Family and stacked.

spec.title: Indexer Utilization
spec.description: At 100 % the indexer is fully utilized.

spec.title: Iterators Open
spec.description: Open Iterators. Should be zero. If not please file an issue.

spec.title: Estimated Number of  Code Systems
spec.description: Estimated number of CQL expressions covered by a Bloom filter.

spec.title: Bloom Filter False Positive Rate
spec.description: Should be always 1%.

spec.title: Estimated Number of Bloom Filters
spec.description: Estimated number of CQL expressions covered by a Bloom filter.

spec.title: Utilization
spec.description: Percentual amount of time, the resource indexer takes for certain actions. Values over 100 % indicate parallel processing.

spec.title: Block Cache Index Additions
spec.description: Added blocks per second.

spec.title: Threads
spec.description: Current number of Threads.

spec.title: Submit Utilization
spec.description: Percentual amount of time needed to submit transaction data. Values above 100% indicate an overload.

spec.title: Number of Index Entries 0.5 Quantile
spec.description: Mean number of index entries of one resource by resource type.

spec.title: Transaction Size 0.5 Quantile
spec.description: Mean number of commands per transaction.

spec.title: Transaction Size 0.9 Quantile
spec.description: 90% quantile of number of commands per transaction.

spec.title: Transaction Size 0.99 Quantile
spec.description: 99% quantile of number of commands per transaction.

spec.title: Transaction Size 0.01 Quantile
spec.description: 1% quantile of number of commands per transaction.

spec.title: Write Timeouts
spec.description: The total number of writes ending up with a timeout.

spec.name: database
spec.label: Database
spec.description: RocksDB database kind.
